stemHtml:
During the validity period of the NOTAM given below, what route shall be filed in the ATS flight plan for an aircraft that is RNAV equipped and has EDDH as the destination?

Q) EDGG/QANLC/I/NBO/E/245/660/5140N00746E020 B) FROM: 15/12/18 14:20 C) TO: 16/03/18 23:59 EST E) RNAV-ROUTE UZ907 BTN ABAMI AND OSDIK NOT AVBL FOR DEST EDDV, EDDH, EDHI, EDHL, EDHK, EDDW, EDWB, EDWE, EDWI. THESE FLIGHTS SHALL FILE ABAMI UM170 OSN.
